Mary's brother carrying a box entered. Tallinn is in Latvia with a probability 50 percent. Muggles can not disappear. Mr Dursley is an American. A kitchen door was open. Agatha is in trouble. Sue is a true patriot. The road leading to the village was narrow. John is a baby bird. Daniel journeyed to the office. The white animal lifted the stone. Earth contains Europe. The book was read by Sara. Frogs are small. Mike is a bird. If X1 is a father of Y1 and Y1 is a father of Z1, X1 is a grandfather of Z1. Sheep are afraid of mice. Nile's length is 80 kilometers. The woman holding a lamp sang. Clinton defeated Dole. Emily is a cat. The letter was written in June. The guide offered the tourists tea. The picture was painted by Leo. John does not fly?
